void Function_453(var uParam0) //Position: 0x14A48
{
    if (!IS_VEHICLE_ENGINE_RUNNING(&uParam0) || !IS_VEHICLE_ALLOWED_TO_DRIVE(&uParam0))
    {
        START_VEHICLE(&uParam0);
        SET_VEHICLE_ENGINE_RUNNING(&uParam0, 1);
    }
    return;
}
